zh.proj1_title:
大型 B2B 專案實績
台灣商業媒合平台
zh.proj1_desc: 一人操刀製作超過 150 頁規模的大型 B2B 電商系統。在高度複雜度的使用者、會員及商家管理介面中，展現了表單邏輯整合與 UI 實作能力。
zh.proj1_f1:
技術架構與模組化
採用 HTML5 / CSS3 (SSR 架構) 為核心，並自定義 SCSS 模組化元件庫。透過組件化思維，在面對龐大頁面量時仍能維持一致的視覺規範，並大幅提升開發效率與後續維護的便利性。
zh.proj1_f2:
高複雜度介面挑戰
成功克服 「五層垂直分類主選單」 的實作難題。在確保導覽結構清晰的前提下，與企劃及工程師深度溝通，規劃出兼具操作直覺與效能的選單功能，完美呈現龐大的資訊階層。
zh.proj1_f3:
效能與搜尋優化
精準管理 JavaScript / jQuery 輕量化套件，整合文字編輯器功能，並針對全站進行 SEO 關鍵字結構優化。
zh.proj1_f4:
極致 RWD 校正
針對不同裝置尺寸進行像素級的仔細校正，確保在 150 頁的繁雜資訊下，用戶在任何載具皆能獲得最精準、流暢的瀏覽體驗。
zh.proj2_title:
學術/技術服務預約平台
國科會自然處尖端核心設施
zh.proj2_desc: 一個結合學術權威感與自動化技術申請流程的整合型專案。負責品牌視覺的高度還原，專注於複雜的「技術服務預約」與「訂單申請」流程，轉化為流暢且直覺的前端交互體驗。
zh.proj2_f1:
專業服務流程的 UI 轉譯
將研究所繁複的技術申請表單與規範，實作為簡潔、易操作的功能介面。透過嚴謹的前端邏輯引導，確保使用者在進行技術服務「下單」與「申請」時，能精準完成各項細節，減少溝通成本。
zh.proj2_f2:
品牌權威與功能的結合
在維持研究單位高質感視覺（如層次感排版、動態進場）的同時，完美整合了會員管理系統與訂單追蹤功能，讓嚴肅的學術服務也能具備現代化的數位操作質感。
zh.proj2_f3:
高精度的 RWD 實作
由於申請流程包含大量表單欄位，針對各類裝置進行了精細的校正，確保使用者在不同載具都能精準、無誤地完成申請程序。
zh.proj3_title:
工業形象官網
LCS Auto & Hardware
zh.proj3_desc: 精準控制工業產品影像的呈現與 RWD 佈局，確保型錄資訊在各種裝置上皆具備極佳的讀取性與載入速度。在這個專案中，我運用了大量的 GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform) 技術，將剛硬的工業產品轉化為具備高質感與流動感的數位體驗。
zh.proj3_f1:
GSAP 驅動的動態交互（抓住眼球）
首頁產品區實作垂直式動態圖文切換效果，透過 GSAP 精準控制捲動節奏，創造出層次分明的進場動態，成功提高使用者的停留時間與下滑意願，將傳統的工業產品介紹轉化為震撼的視覺敘事。
zh.proj3_f2:
導覽體驗優化（增加互動感）
在產品介紹頁面中，規劃了產品項目錨點定位，讓客戶能根據需求快速跳轉至目標產品，並在定位過程中維持優雅的過場視覺，在提升操作便利性的同時，也為嚴謹的工業型錄增添了細膩的互動感。
zh.proj3_f3:
性能與視覺的平衡
雖然使用了大量的動態效果，但我針對 GSAP 的渲染路徑進行了優化，確保在呈現高解析度工業影像時，依然能維持極佳的流暢度與跨瀏覽器相容性。
zh.about_desc:
擅長遠端作業與自主管理
從設計到編碼的精準性
高效協作與模組化元件
zh.cases_desc:
300+ 專案
12年遠端經驗
職人工匠的態度
zh.about_p1:
- 前端開發： HTML5, CSS3, SCSS, RWD, JavaScript, TypeScript
- 框架與工具： Vue, React, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, jQuery
- 設計與實作： 1:1 Pixel-Perfect, UI Design, Figma, PS/AI, Wireframe
- 技術優化： SEO優化, 網頁效能優化, 跨瀏覽器相容性
zh.about_p2:
自 13 歲製作第一個網站起，這份熱愛已持續 26 年，早已內化成我生活的一部分。
憑藉這份初衷，我一路攻讀資料處理與資訊管理專業，並正式投入網頁開發領域 16 年。
zh.about_p3: 我始終將不斷進化的技術視為養分，從早期的 jQuery、Bootstrap 到現代的 Vue, React 與 AI 協作開發，我享受每一場技術變革帶來的可能性。
zh.about_p4: 在累積 300+ 專案的過程中，磨練出對跨裝置適應性 RWD 的掌控，對於 UI 精準判斷與自訂模組化元件來提高效率。
zh.about_p5: 不論是活動網站、購物車平台、企業形象網站，或是 舊站 RWD 重構，我都具備豐富經驗與實作成果。對於跨瀏覽器、跨裝置的適應性以及人性化的互動設計，亦有成熟的理解與應用。
zh.about_p6: 網站設計對我而言不只是專業，更是結合熱情與創造力的持續探索。

en.proj1_title:
Large-scale B2B Project
Taiwan Business Matchmaking Platform
en.proj1_desc: Single-handedly developed a large-scale B2B e-commerce system with over 150 pages. Demonstrated strong form logic integration and UI implementation capabilities in highly complex user, member, and merchant management interfaces.
en.proj1_f1:
Technical Architecture & Modularization
Built with HTML5 / CSS3 (SSR) as the core, implementing a custom SCSS modular component library. This component-based approach maintained consistent visual guidelines across massive pages while boosting development efficiency.
en.proj1_f2:
Complex Interface Challenges
Successfully overcame the implementation of a '5-level vertical category menu'. Communicated deeply with PMs and backend engineers to plan an intuitive and performant navigation structure, perfectly presenting massive information layers.
en.proj1_f3:
Performance & SEO Optimization
Precisely managed lightweight JS/jQuery plugins, integrated rich text editors, and structurally optimized global SEO keywords.
en.proj1_f4:
Extreme RWD Calibration
Conducted pixel-perfect calibration across various devices to ensure users experience accurate and smooth browsing despite the complex data of 150 pages.
en.proj2_title:
Academic/Tech Service Booking Platform
NSTC Core Facilities
en.proj2_desc: An integrated project combining academic authority with automated workflows. Responsible for highly accurate brand visual implementation, transforming complex 'tech service booking' and 'order applications' into smooth and intuitive front-end experiences.
en.proj2_f1:
UI Translation for Pro Services
Converted complicated research application forms into concise, easy-to-use interfaces. Through strict front-end logic, ensured users can accurately complete booking details, reducing communication costs.
en.proj2_f2:
Combining Authority with Functionality
While maintaining high-quality academic visuals (hierarchical layouts, dynamic entries), seamlessly integrated member management and order tracking, giving serious academic services a modern digital feel.
en.proj2_f3:
High-Precision RWD
Since the application process involves numerous form fields, detailed responsive calibrations were made to ensure users can flawlessly complete applications on any device.
en.proj3_desc: Precisely controlled the presentation of industrial product images and RWD layouts, ensuring catalog readability and fast loading. Utilized extensive GSAP techniques to transform rigid industrial products into a highly textured, fluid digital experience.
en.proj3_f1:
GSAP-Driven Dynamic Interactions
Implemented vertical dynamic image-text switching on the homepage. Controlled scrolling rhythm via GSAP to create layered entrance animations, effectively increasing user retention and transforming traditional catalogs into stunning visual narratives.
en.proj3_f2:
Navigation Experience Optimization
Planned anchor positioning for product items in catalog pages, allowing quick jumps to targets while maintaining elegant transitions. This enhanced usability while adding delicate interactivity to a strict industrial catalog.
en.proj3_f3:
Balance Between Performance & Visuals
Despite heavy animations, optimized GSAP rendering paths to maintain excellent fluidity and cross-browser compatibility when displaying high-res industrial images.
en.about_desc:
Proficient in remote work and self-management
Precision from design to coding
Efficient collaboration & modular components
en.about_p1:
- Front-End: HTML5, CSS3, SCSS, RWD, JavaScript, TypeScript
- Frameworks & Tools: Vue, React, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, jQuery
- Design & Implementation: 1:1 Pixel-Perfect, UI Design, Figma, PS/AI, Wireframe
- Optimization: SEO, Web Performance, Cross-Browser Compatibility
en.about_p2:
Since building my first website at 13, this passion has continued for 26 years and has become an integral part of my life.
With this original intention, I studied Data Processing and Information Management, and have been officially working in web development for 16 years.
en.about_p3: I always consider continuously evolving technology as my nourishment. From early jQuery and Bootstrap to modern Vue, React, and AI-assisted development, I enjoy the possibilities brought by every technological change.
en.about_p4: Through accumulating 300+ projects, I have honed my mastery of cross-device responsive web design (RWD), precise UI judgment, and the creation of custom modular components to improve efficiency.
en.about_p5: Whether it's a campaign site, e-commerce platform, corporate website, or refactoring an old site with RWD, I have rich experience and practical results. I also have a mature understanding and application of cross-browser and cross-device compatibility, as well as user-friendly interactive design.
en.about_p6: For me, web design is not just a profession, but a continuous exploration combining passion and creativity.
